center.name: 瓦登海
center.summary: 瓦登海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括白颊黑雁、红腹滨鹬，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | title=Impacts of highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) on a Barnacle Goose Branta leucopsis population wintering on the Solway Firth, UK | journal=Bird Study | date=2025-02-07 | issn=0006-3657 | doi=10.1080/00063657.2024.2443225 | pages=1–12| doi-access=free }} * Breeding on Novaya Zemlya, Dolgy Island, Kanin Peninsula, Yugorsky Peninsula and the Barents Sea coastline in the Russian Arctic, wintering in the Wadden Sea area in southwest Denmark, northwest Germany and the Netherlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In temperate regions such as the Wadden Sea they have been found to change roost sites each week and their feeding range may be as much as during the course of a week. It is long-lived for a bird of its size; a bird ringed at Brora in northern Scotland as a first-winter in October 1978 (when 3–4 months old) was resighted still alive at Den Helder in the Netherlands in February 2006, 27 years, 3 months, and 29 days after being ringed. Another, tagged "B95" and nicknamed 'Moonbird', of the subspecies C
